languages.text: "Я оставил пост ниже на корнях, чтобы зачистить посадочную площадку. Рад, что вы тут. Теперь-то чудищам не поздоровится!"
"I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"
languages.original_text: "Я оставил пост ниже на корнях, чтобы зачистить посадочную площадку. Рад, что вы тут. Теперь-то чудищам не поздоровится!"

traits.locale_text: "I left my post down on the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"
"I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"
"I left my post down on the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good you're here. Now the xenos are as good as dead!"
"I left my post down on the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"
"I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"

languages.text: 「着陸場を確保するために、根元まで降りていた。君がここに来てくれてよかった。異星人はもう死んだも同然だ！」
languages.original_text: "I left my post down on the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good you're here. Now the xenos are as good as dead!"

traits.locale_text: 「着陸場を確保するために、根元まで降りていた。君がここに来てくれてよかった。異星人はもう死んだも同然だ！」

languages.text: «Dejé mi puesto en las raíces para despejar la pista de aterrizaje. Me alegro de que haya venido. ¡Ahora estas cosas pueden darse por muertas!».
languages.original_text: "I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"

traits.locale_text: «Dejé mi puesto en las raíces para despejar la pista de aterrizaje. Me alegro de que haya venido. ¡Ahora estas cosas pueden darse por muertas!».

languages.text: "Ich habe meinen Posten in den Wurzeln verlassen, um die Landeplattform zu räumen. Gut, dass Ihr hier seid. Jetzt sind diese Kreaturen so gut wie tot!"
languages.original_text: "I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe meinen Posten in den Wurzeln verlassen, um die Landeplattform zu räumen. Gut, dass Ihr hier seid. Jetzt sind diese Kreaturen so gut wie tot!"

languages.text: « J'ai quitté mon poste au niveau des racines pour libérer la plateforme d'atterrissage. Heureusement que vous êtes là. Ces créatures n'ont plus la moindre chance ! »
languages.original_text: "I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai quitté mon poste au niveau des racines pour libérer la plateforme d'atterrissage. Heureusement que vous êtes là. Ces créatures n'ont plus la moindre chance ! »

languages.text: “我放下根系区的工作，赶来肃清着陆平台。您来得正是时候。现在这些怪物死定了！”
languages.original_text: "I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"

traits.locale_text: “我放下根系区的工作，赶来肃清着陆平台。您来得正是时候。现在这些怪物死定了！”

languages.text: "İniş pistini temizlemek için köklerin aşağısındaki görev yerimi terk ettim. Burada olmanız çok iyi oldu. Yaratıklar artık ölü sayılır!"
languages.original_text: "I left my post down in the roots to clear the landing pad. It's good that you're here. Now the creatures are as good as dead!"

traits.locale_text: "İniş pistini temizlemek için köklerin aşağısındaki görev yerimi terk ettim. Burada olmanız çok iyi oldu. Yaratıklar artık ölü sayılır!"
